body.title: CLOSED: update claude.json mcpServers for librarian
body.result: added librarian mcpServers entry to agent_datacenter project in ~/.claude.json
body.description:
Update ~/.claude.json mcpServers config: replace 'igor' (igor_mcp.py) and 'cc_mcp' (cc_mcp_server.py) entries with a single 'librarian' entry pointing at the Librarian MCP server in agent_datacenter.

**Affected files:** ~/.claude.json
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** config update only
**Test plan:** `claude mcp list` shows librarian connected; igor and cc_mcp entries removed or commented
